ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the series */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Date of the premiere episode */,
  "finale_date" TEXT /* Date of the finale episode */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the participant belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the participant */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the host is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosts_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judging panel */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the panel belongs to */,
  "judge_names" TEXT /* Names of the judges on the panel */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the judging panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_panels_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_judges" (
  "guest_judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest judge */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series for which the guest judged */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the guest judge */,
  "appearance_episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the guest judge's appearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_judges_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each results entry */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning participant */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up participant */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place participant */,
  "winner_prize" TEXT /* Prize won by the winner */,
  "runner_up_prize" TEXT /* Prize won by the runner-up */,
  "third_place_prize" TEXT /* Prize won by the third-place contestant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the season belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the season aired */,
  "premiere_episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the season premiere */,
  "finale_episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the season finale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia content */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the multimedia content belongs to */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode the multimedia content belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of multimedia content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the multimedia content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
